name: google-ads-pp-mcp
description: Query and manage Google Ads accounts from the terminal.

google_ads_access_token.title: GOOGLE_ADS_ACCESS_TOKEN
google_ads_access_token.description: OAuth2 access token with the https://www.googleapis.com/auth/adwords scope.

google_ads_developer_token.title: GOOGLE_ADS_DEVELOPER_TOKEN
google_ads_developer_token.description: Google Ads developer token sent as the developer-token header.

google_ads_login_customer_id.title: GOOGLE_ADS_LOGIN_CUSTOMER_ID
google_ads_login_customer_id.description: Optional. Optional manager account ID sent as the login-customer-id header.
